script: for B in heather kaye; do echo "========== $B =========="; echo '----- service unit -----'; systemctl cat ${B}-bot.service --no-pager 2>&1 | grep -E 'ExecStart|Description' | head -3; echo '----- bot/responder source files -----'; ls /home/azureuser/${B}-* 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo '----- model used (anthropic / openai / claude / gpt search) -----'; for f in $(ls /home/azureuser/${B}-*.py 2>/dev/null); do echo "  $f:"; grep -iE 'anthropic|openai|claude|gpt|api.openai|api.anthropic|model.*=.*"' $f 2>/dev/null | head -5; done; echo '----- Teams catalog entry -----'; TOKEN=$(/home/azureuser/yoomd-appcatalog-token.sh 2>/dev/null); curl -s "https://graph.microsoft.com/v1.0/appCatalogs/teamsApps?%24filter=distributionMethod%20eq%20%27organization%27" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" | jq ".value[] | select(.displayName | test(\"$B\"; \"i\")) | {id, externalId, displayName}" 2>&1 | head -10; echo; done
